proof_limits: compose_building assembles caller / COO declared node and edge choices only

returned.checked_work: design Brick for task-source:inline-statement (P4 design Building: 4-LLM standard graph dogfood design), against design/return.yaml required_return_shape and the inline task's 6 required design items.
missing_or_mismatched_facts: Inline task asked to 'Return exact observed_evidence refs, narrowly_proven, not_proven, and next Movement candidate', but the governing design/return.yaml has no narrowly_proven field and no movement field (movement_choice is forbidden). The design emitted observed_evidence + evidence_refs + not_proven and folded the next-Building/Movement candidate into proposed_changes.next_building_candidate and candidate_file_changes; there is no top-level narrowly_proven. This is a wording gap between the inline statement and the design template, not a return-shape violation.
Design's claim 'all six objects admit adapter:codex-fugu-local' was only spot-verified for dev.yaml (admits codex-fugu-local); the other five objects were not individually re-read in this review.

Gemini-lane node lists model_ref 'model:gemini:default' while pairing 'agent-object:inspector'; adapter/object admission verified, but the model-ref->adapter resolution at run is unverified (design itself lists this under not_proven).
narrowly_proven: The design return contains all 13 declared design return_shape fields and no forbidden top-level keys.

Each cited load-bearing source claim (observed-write adapter set; gemini admission only via inspector/qa; pre-existing fan-out/fan-in/closure mechanism in triage-fanout-3; mixed-provider precedent in review-fleet) reproduces against the worktree artifacts I read.
All 6 inline-task design items are addressed by named fields in the returned object.
not_proven: Semantic fitness/quality of the proposed 4-LLM graph and whether one fan-in closure suffices for hard QA — not judged (human/quality scope).
Whether the proposed preset would materialize green — no checker run (review is read-only; avoided --all and live runs).
Live 4-provider execution, provider availability, model-ref backend resolution, and claude-local runtime write — all unobserved (carried as design's own not_proven).
Design's 'all six objects admit codex-fugu-local' claim beyond dev.yaml — not exhaustively re-verified.
Sufficiency for Link Movement and route target — not decided here (Link gate's authority).
observed_evidence: Read prior step-output.json (work/step-outputs/four-llm-standard-graph-dogfood-design-0625-design-attempt-1/step-output.json): agent_object_ref=design-lead, adapter:claude-local, returned object carries all 13 design fields.

Read brick/templates/bricks/design/return.yaml: required_return_shape = [observed_evidence, design_summary, relevant_current_structure, proposed_changes, unchanged_surfaces, axis_responsibility, invariants, edge_cases, checker_or_verifier_plan, candidate_file_changes, evidence_refs, not_proven, reading_scope_map]; forbidden_return_keys = success/failure/approved/quality/movement_choice/route_target.

Read declared-building-plan.json: design node required_return_shape string matches the 13-field template; work_statement = 'design Brick for task-source:inline-statement'; design->review->closure all movement=forward, gate link-gate:default-transition.
Read support/connection/adapter_constants.py: _OBSERVED_WRITE_ADAPTER_REFS={codex-local, codex-fugu-local, claude-local}; gemini-local={read,review,web}, gemini-api={read,review} (no write).
Grep agent/objects gemini: only inspector.yaml (gemini-local + gemini-api) and qa.yaml (gemini-local) admit a gemini adapter; dev.yaml admits no gemini adapter.

Read brick/templates/presets/triage-fanout-3.md: graph_topology with fan_out_groups, fan_in_groups(converge_on triage-closure), closure_transition_target_policy, gate_concept_profile incl fan-in-wait-all — fan/fan-in/closure mechanism pre-exists.
Read brick/templates/presets/review-fleet.md: catalog_scope common; per-step selected_adapter_ref + selected_model_ref(model:claude:sonnet) — mixed-provider precedent confirmed.

Source claims reproduce: observed-write adapter set, gemini admission only via inspector/qa, fan-in mechanism in triage-fanout-3, mixed-provider precedent in review-fleet — all match worktree artifacts.
Env constraint (permission-denied under /Users/smith/projects/BRICK) correctly recorded in not_proven rather than as a transition_concern.
